data.title: Apple Stock Is Sliding Wednesday: What's Going On?
data.description: Apple Inc (NASDAQ:AAPL) shares are trading lower Wednesday afternoon after an analyst reported that iPhone 16 orders were cut by around 10 million units.

data.title: DEA Faces Setback As Judge Denies Request To Block Witnesses In Psychedelics Ban Hearing
data.description: A DEA judge denies the agency's request to block witnesses in a hearing challenging its proposed ban on two key psychedelic compounds.

Neuropsychiatry-Focused Alto Neuroscience's Mid-Stage Depression Trial Disappoints, Analyst Notes Failure Raises Concerns About Platform
data.description: Alto Neuroscience's ALTO-100 Phase 2b study for major depressive disorder failed to meet its primary endpoint, but the company plans further data analysis and studies.
